Hardware Component File

N_L21B_ATCVT(FKK2)_D5_20170111

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_L21B_ATCVT(FKK2)_D5_20170111.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7E1
Receive ID 7E9
Functional Addr 6E
Functional Name AT_CVT

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "50",
    "supplier": "1111",
    "soft": "5555",
    "version": "1111"
  }
]
